summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AeroExotic website enhancement - quote form, contact info updates, and CTA changes. All features working correctly.

Navbar displays phone (509) 799-5696 and 'Get a Quote' button

Quote form 'Prefer to talk?' shows correct phone number
Loading screen appears with video intro and dismisses properly
